parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the chorus. Only active when LFO Man is turned on. When set to note values, Rate follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.L Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the Left delay channel/chorus circuit 1.
parameters-en.C Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the Center delay channel/chorus circuit 2.
parameters-en.R Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the Right delay channel/chorus circuit 3.
parameters-en.LFO Prst: When on, engages an "ensemble-style" chorus preset with fixed Rate, L Depth, C Depth, and R Depth.
parameters-en.LFO Man: When on, enables control of Rate, L Depth, C Depth, and R Depth. Can be used in conjunction with LFO Prst.
parameters-en.L Boost: Adds an enhanced frequency response to the Left delay channel, making it a bit more pronounced.
parameters-en.C Boost: Adds an enhanced frequency response to the Center delay channel, making it a bit more pronounced.
parameters-en.R Boost: Adds an enhanced frequency response to the Right delay channel, making it a bit more pronounced.
parameters-en.Mode: Selects whether Trinity Chorus operates in mono or stereo.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
